verdict: High AI displacement risk, with potential for automation of routine tasks and analysis.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine Cognitive Tasks
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 1, 2, and 4 from the O*NET task list involve monitoring systems, updating virus protection, and performing risk assessments, which are routine cognitive tasks that can be automated by AI.

reasoning_steps.title: AI Capability Gap
reasoning_steps.body: The AI capability gap is significant for Cybersecurity Analysts, as tasks 3 (encrypting data transmissions) and 10 (coordinating implementation of computer system plan) require expertise in cryptography and system integration, which are areas where AI is still lagging.

reasoning_steps.title: Regulatory Moat
reasoning_steps.body: While cybersecurity regulations exist, they are not as strict or widely enforced as those in other fields, such as finance or healthcare. This lack of a regulatory moat increases the risk of automation replacing human analysts.

adjacent_careers.name: Information Security Analyst
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Cybersecurity Analysts and Information Security Analysts overlap significantly in their tasks, with the latter focusing more on network security and the former on endpoint protection.

adjacent_careers.name: Penetration Tester
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Penetration testers and cybersecurity analysts share some similarities in their work, but penetration testers focus more on simulating attacks to test system vulnerabilities.

recent_developments.headline: New AI-powered vulnerability scanner released
recent_developments.impact: This new tool may automate some of the routine tasks performed by cybersecurity analysts, increasing the risk of automation.

recent_developments.headline: AI coding assistants see broad enterprise adoption
recent_developments.impact: Major firms report 25–30% of new code is now AI-generated and reviewed by engineers.

quotes.quote: Software engineering will be very different by the end of 2025. Most code will be written by AI, with human engineers reviewing and directing.
quotes.speaker: Dario Amodei
quotes.title: CEO, Anthropic

quotes.quote: AI is going to be the biggest technological shift of our lifetimes. Bigger than mobile, bigger than the web. Inside Microsoft, more than 30 percent of the code in some projects is now written by AI.
quotes.speaker: Satya Nadella
quotes.title: CEO, Microsoft

quotes.quote: More than a quarter of new code at Google is generated by AI, then reviewed and accepted by engineers.
quotes.speaker: Sundar Pichai
quotes.title: CEO, Google / Alphabet
